[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)

- Description: Blog post: Plug-and-play architecture — why every service reads from one sheet
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/48
  
  Details:
  Published a new blog post on truesight.me documenting TrueSight DAO's plug-and-play architecture pattern and future L3/L4 blockchain direction.
  
  ## What changed
  - Added `blog/posts/plug-and-play-architecture-why-every-service-reads-from-one-sheet.html`
  - Updated `blog/index.html` with new card at top of grid
  - Updated Do Nothing Society post footer nav to point to new post
  
  ## Summary
  The post explains the funnel pattern (Edgar → Google Sheets Telegram Chat Logs → ecosystem services), the RSA signature security model, and why new services can plug in without custom APIs. It also carefully frames L3 (TrueChain, designed but not running) and L4 (public-chain tip anchor, proposed) as future directions rather than shipped products, per BLOCKCHAIN_ANCHORING_PROPOSAL.md v0.3.
  
  ## Publishing
  - Published by: Kimi (Moonshot AI)
  - Date: April 24, 2026
